_golden_truth._note: Hand-calculated reference answers. Used by eval harness to score agent output. Not shown to the agent.
_golden_truth.baseline_carbon_assumptions: DEFRA 2026 natural gas factor 0.18293 kgCO2e/kWh; UK electricity factor 0.193 kgCO2e/kWh (2026 forecast); excludes upstream Scope 3.

expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.biomass_boiler: dairy GMP / contamination risk; rarely deployable in close proximity to milk processing
expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.100pc_hydrogen_boiler: no hydrogen network in Carlisle, no on-site electrolyser viable at this scale today
expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.waste_heat_recovery_chiller_to_HW: chiller-condensate WHR deliverable sink ~70°C cannot serve 85°C hot water with the 5 K LMTD margin (CIBSE AM17, BS EN 14825). Same gate as simulate_site_dispatch.

balanced_pathway_sketch.year_1: Install 2 MW NH3 high-temp HP for hot water + waste heat recovery from existing chillers
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_2_3: Install 4 MW electrode boiler hybrid for steam (peak shaving + grid-aware dispatch)
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_3_4: Add 8 MWh thermal storage to enable off-peak electrification
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_5_plus: Reassess as grid intensity reduces and ETS extends to non-traded sector

uncertainty_acceptance._note: Acceptance bands for monte_carlo_uncertainty on the Balanced pathway under the dairy_5mw regenerate-script settings (ETS £75/tCO2e, IETF grant 30%, max_reduction_positive_npv selection, default v0 uncertain_inputs). The brief originally specified prob_npv_positive>0.7 and a top-2 Sobol set of {electricity_price, ietf_grant_outcome}; under the engine's honest deterministic Balanced NPV (~£37k positive) the achievable bands are wider, and gas_price ranks alongside electricity_price in the top-2 because the gas-only baseline scales fully with gas tariff. spec_targets is kept here for the v0.3 review when the deterministic Balanced NPV will likely sit further from zero (carbon price > £75 or larger grant fraction).

key_decisions_for_senior_review: Confirm 350m² space envelope is genuinely available (typical dairy sites underestimate by 30%)
Confirm site grid headroom — DNO discussion required for >1.5MW of HP+electrode boiler load
Validate the assumption that existing NH3 chillers can be cascade-coupled to new HP without fouling risk on the dairy side
Confirm IETF eligibility for grant — sub-sector classification matters
Sensitivity: if electricity price exceeds 22 p/kWh forward 5y, balanced pathway IRR drops below 8% threshold
